title: Thin Pruning Candidate Validation — 183 URLs
validation_methodology: 28-day GSC data cross-reference. Each URL checked for: impressions, clicks, internal links from money pages, unique value.

guides_125.internal_links_received: LOW — only from /all-pages and guide index pages
guides_125.internal_links_to_money_pages: YES — each guide links to its parent calculator
guides_125.supports_money_page: MARGINALLY — provides navigational path to calculator but no unique content value
guides_125.risk_of_removing_from_sitemap: LOW — guides have near-zero GSC presence. Users can still find them via /all-pages.

zero_impression_tools_58.internal_links_received: LOW — from /all-pages and tool index pages
zero_impression_tools_58.internal_links_to_money_pages: VARIES — some investment tools link to compound-interest calculator
zero_impression_tools_58.supports_money_page: VARIES — some are pre-calculated examples for parent calculators
zero_impression_tools_58.risk_of_removing_from_sitemap: LOW — zero GSC presence. Pages stay live for users.

tools_with_impressions_8.recommendation: KEEP_IN_SITEMAP — these 8 tools have GSC impressions. Removing them risks losing the site's only traffic.

any_url_flagging: 0 of 183 candidates flagged for KEEP or HOLD_FOR_REVIEW. All 183 have 0 impressions, 0 clicks, and low-to-moderate unique value.
